sections.name: Multiple Choice
sections.quote: Section I: Multiple Choice — 60 Questions | 80 minutes | 70% of Exam Score. The multiple-choice section includes individual questions as well as sets of 2, 3, or 4 questions.

sections.name: Free Response
sections.quote: Section II: Free Response — 1 Question | 50 minutes | 30% of Exam Score. The free-response question gives students different sources of information from the same device, including: a set of firewall rules, several system and application logs, a list of files with their permissions, a device policy.
